title: HotbarAPI
description: API for adding Status Bars, highlighting hotbar slots, and more
body:
HotbarAPI is an API that: 
- Allows easy partially-data-driven registration of Status Bars.
- Allows highlighting hotbar slots based on integer or item. (**Unsupported on 1.21.6**)
- more soon™

HotbarAPI can be used as a client side mod, or can receive custom status bars from the server (but they still have to be registered on the client)

Its recommended to use [HotbarAPI Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/hotbarapi-compat) for compat with other mods.
